item.title: Smart Car Repair Challenges Explained
item.description: A look at common challenges when repairing Smart cars. Covering diagnostics, limited space, and the unique design factors that make maintenance more complex.

media:content.media:title: Smart Car Repair Challenges Explained
media:content.media:description: A look at common challenges when repairing Smart cars. Covering diagnostics, limited space, and the unique design factors that make maintenance more complex.

item.title: How a Clutch Fails in a Car
item.description: A simple breakdown of how and why a car clutch can fail. Covering wear, driving habits, and mechanical issues that lead to slipping, noise, or loss of engagement.

media:content.media:title: How a Clutch Fails in a Car
media:content.media:description: A simple breakdown of how and why a car clutch can fail. Covering wear, driving habits, and mechanical issues that lead to slipping, noise, or loss of engagement.

item.title: High-Mileage Avalanche Inspection
item.description: A detailed inspection of a 325,000-mile Chevrolet Avalanche. Step-by-step evaluation of wear, maintenance history, and what keeps high-mileage vehicles running.

media:content.media:title: High-Mileage Avalanche Inspection
media:content.media:description: A detailed inspection of a 325,000-mile Chevrolet Avalanche. Step-by-step evaluation of wear, maintenance history, and what keeps high-mileage vehicles running.

item.title: Bus Repair Plans Change
item.description: A look at changing repair plans during a bus service project. Adjusting diagnostics, reassessing issues, and adapting the repair approach based on new findings.

item.title: Common Causes of Clutch Failure
item.description: A breakdown of why clutches commonly fail in vehicles. Covering wear patterns, driving habits, and mechanical issues that lead to slipping, noise, or loss of function.

item.title: Three Cars, Three Repair Issues
item.description: A look at diagnostics across three different vehicles. Step-by-step inspection of separate issues, troubleshooting methods, and repair considerations for each car.

item.title: Dealer Mistake and Lexus LX450 Repair
item.description: A repair breakdown of a Lexus LX450 alongside a dealership-related mistake. Inspection, diagnosis, and fixes to restore proper performance and reliability.

item.description: A breakdown of Audi reliability and common issues seen in real-world use. Covering maintenance needs, weak points, and what to expect from long-term ownership.

item.title: 6 Reliable Cars Under $10K
item.description: A breakdown of six dependable used vehicles available under $10,000. Focus on reliability, maintenance costs, and practical options for budget-friendly car buyers.

item.title: A True Utility Vehicle Explained
item.description: A look at what makes a vehicle truly useful for work and daily tasks. Focus on practicality, durability, and features that support heavy-duty utility use.

item.title: 2019 Grand Cherokee at 100K Miles Review
item.description: A detailed look at a 2019 Grand Cherokee reaching 100,000 miles. Focus on reliability, wear points, and what to expect from long-term ownership and maintenance.
